song.title: Rise
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Your love will never fail, You're steadfast. Your promises are true, You're faithful. You cover all my sins with forgiveness. My eyes have seen Your ways, Your goodness.
[P] Love and Faithfulness meet, We behold Your glory. Righteousness and Peace kiss, Heaven's all around us.
[C] Chorus Spring up, oh well, Living water rise within us. Spring up, oh well, Holy Spirit deep within us. (2x)||
Rise, Rise
[B] We'll see Your goodness In the land of the living.
